description_long: This is a two-seater sofa upholstered in a plaid-patterned fabric featuring shades of yellow, orange, and muted red. The sofa has a boxy, modern silhouette with straight lines and squared-off armrests that are level with the seat cushions. The seat and backrest each consist of two large, rectangular cushions that appear to be attached, providing a uniform and structured appearance. The sofa stands on four short, block-style wooden legs, which are dark in color and positioned at the corners for stability. The backrest is straight and of medium height, matching the width of the seat and armrests, and the overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The upholstery fabric has a matte finish and a soft, slightly textured surface, contributing to a comfortable and inviting look.
description: A boxy, plaid-patterned two-seater sofa with straight armrests, attached seat and back cushions, and short block wooden legs. The upholstery features warm tones and a matte, soft texture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, squared armrest and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous plaid backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the straight armrest and cushion profile seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the two attached seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the inviting seating area.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, forming a symmetrical and structured seating area.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, squared armrests at seat height, fully padded and integrated into the sofa's boxy silhouette, with no decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style wooden legs positioned at each corner, dark in color, exposed, and providing stable support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two attached rectangular cushions, continuous and unsegmented, matching the seat cushion arrangement.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Plaid-patterned fabric in warm tones of yellow, orange, and red, with a matte, slightly textured finish and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
